[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeGrid](../../TextmodeGrid.md) / rows

# Accessor: rows

## Get Signature

```ts
get rows(): number;
```

Number of rows in the grid.

### Returns

`number`

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="rows" encoded-code="-" />

## Set Signature

```ts
set rows(newRows): void;
```

Set the number of rows and lock grid sizing until `responsive()` is called.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type |
| ------ | ------ |
| `newRows` | `number` |

### Returns

`void`

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="rows" encoded-code="-" />
